summary: Iteration 84 backend testing completed successfully. All 17 tests passed (100%). Tested the new 'Consegne al Cliente (DDT + DoP + CE)' feature. FIXED TWO BUGS: 1) GET /api/commesse/{cid}/ops was not returning 'consegne' array - added consegne to response, 2) Frontend CommessaOpsPanel.js line 120 had typo 'opsData' instead of 'ops' - fixed to use ops?.consegne. POST /api/commesse/{cid}/consegne creates DDT in ddt_documents collection, auto-fills lines from material_batches, adds consegna to commessa.consegne array. GET pacchetto-pdf returns merged PDF (DDT + DoP + CE). Regression tests confirm produzione and conto_lavoro workflows still work.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: GET /api/commesse/{cid}/ops was missing 'consegne' key in response - now returns consegne array correctly
BUG FIXED: Frontend CommessaOpsPanel.js line 120 had undefined variable 'opsData' - fixed to use 'ops?.consegne || []'
ensure_ops_fields() now initializes consegne: [] for new commesse (line 51-53 in commessa_ops.py)
POST /{cid}/consegne creates DDT with ddt_type='vendita', links to commessa_id, auto-fills lines from material_batches
GET /{cid}/consegne/{consegna_id}/pacchetto-pdf merges DDT + DoP + CE PDFs using pypdf.PdfWriter
test_credentials: MongoDB session tokens created/cleaned during pytest run
seed_data_creation: Test commesse and DDT documents created during tests, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 84 adds Consegne al Cliente feature. Key endpoints: POST /api/commesse/{cid}/consegne (creates DDT + consegna record), GET /api/commesse/{cid}/consegne/{consegna_id}/pacchetto-pdf (merged PDF). GET /api/commesse/{cid}/ops now returns 'consegne' array. Frontend has data-testid='btn-nuova-consegna' and data-testid='consegna-pacchetto-{id}' buttons. Fixed bug where opsData was undefined in CommessaOpsPanel.js.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: GET /api/commesse/{cid}/ops endpoint did not return consegne array in response
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added consegne = doc.get('consegne', []) and included in return dict, also added ensure_ops_fields() call and doc refresh

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Line 120 referenced undefined variable 'opsData' instead of 'ops'
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Moved consegne declaration to line 196 where ops data is extracted: const consegne = ops?.consegne || []

crea_consegna_basic.details: POST consegne returns consegna_id, ddt_id, ddt_number

crea_consegna_creates_ddt.details: DDT created in ddt_documents with commessa_id link

crea_consegna_autofills_lines.details: DDT lines populated from material_batches or default

pacchetto_pdf_marks_flags.details: dop_generata and ce_generata set to True

ensure_ops_fields_initializes_consegne.details: New commesse get empty consegne array

regression_produzione_basic.details: PUT produzione basic stato update works
